product_overview: Worktion is a full‑stack Project Management Office (PMO) web application that provides teams with a dashboard, project management, task boards, timelines, and collaboration tools. It uses session-based auth and a Next.js + Drizzle ORM backend to manage projects, tasks, users, and related resources.
core_goals: Provide a secure, session-based authentication flow for team access and role-based permissions.
Enable teams to create, view, update, and delete projects with member, tag, and progress management.
Offer a consolidated dashboard with productivity metrics, upcoming schedule, and recent activity for quick status at a glance.
Expose RESTful APIs for projects, tasks, and related entities to support UI operations and integrations.
Ensure a responsive, discoverable UI with route-based navigation and a global command palette for quick access.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register and log in using a session-based authentication system that issues an HTTP-only session cookie and protects dashboard and API routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button (Submit login form) -> Receive session_token cookie and be redirected to /
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button (Submit login form) -> See inline error 'Invalid credentials' and remain on /login
Navigate to /register -> Fill name field -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Register button (Submit registration form) -> See success message and be redirected to /login

Navigate to /register -> Fill name field -> Fill email field (existing email) -> Fill password field -> Click Register button (Submit registration form) -> See inline error 'Email already registered' and remain on /register

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Authenticated users see an aggregated dashboard with productivity charts, workload balance, upcoming schedule, and recent activity to monitor team and project health.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Middleware validates session_token cookie -> See dashboard overview with productivity charts, utilization, upcoming schedule, and recent activity
Navigate to / -> No session_token cookie present -> Be redirected to /login

Navigate to / -> Middleware validates session_token cookie -> Click a dashboard widget (e.g., project card) -> Navigate to /projects or /projects/[id] depending on widget and see related project list or detail

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create, view, edit, and delete projects. Projects include title, description, color label, members, tags, and visible progress metrics. Detail views provide project-specific task progress and member overview.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects -> See list of projects with titles, colors, tags, and progress indicators -> Select a project to view details -> Navigate to /projects/[id] -> See project title, description, members, tags, and progress

Navigate to /projects -> Select a project to view details -> Navigate to /projects/[id] -> Click Edit project button -> Update project title field -> Update project description field -> Update tags field -> Click Save -> See updated project details on /projects/[id]

Navigate to /projects -> Select a project to view details -> Navigate to /projects/[id] -> Click Edit project button -> Clear title field -> Click Save -> See inline validation error 'Title is required' and remain on /projects/[id]
Navigate to /projects -> Select a project to view details -> Navigate to /projects/[id] -> Click Delete project button -> Confirm deletion in modal -> See project removed from /projects list

Navigate to /projects -> Select a project to view details -> Navigate to /projects/[id] -> Click Delete project button -> Confirm deletion in modal -> Receive 'Unauthorized' or server error response -> See error 'Unable to delete project' and project remains in /projects list

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create, read, update, and delete projects with members, tags, and progress tracking.
user_interactions: Select a project to view details
Update project title, description, and tags
